title: stelis cucullata
intro: Stelis cucullata, also known as the hooded orchid, is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Stelis cucullata include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, colds, and skin infections, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and relieve respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Stelis cucullata typically involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, or other remedies for various health conditions.
